hero.tagline: We don't tell you what to think.
hero.tagline_accent: We show you where the information comes from.
hero.description: unsere.news is an open-source, community-driven platform for traceable research. The community votes on which questions get investigated. When a topic crosses the threshold, our AI — verified by editors — produces a source analysis built strictly on primary sources. Every claim traceable. Every source linked.

banner.text: Every report AI-researched, editorially reviewed, traceable to primary sources.

transparent.title: Radical Transparency
transparent.body: Every published sourced claim is traceable to a verifiable primary source — government PDFs, scientific papers, raw data — accessible in a single click.

community.title: Community-Driven
community.body: The community decides which questions get investigated — not what the answers are. No editorial gatekeeping. When a topic crosses the vote threshold, the research begins automatically.

open.title: Open Source
open.body: MIT licensed. Public repository from day one. The code, methodology, and funding are all open for inspection.

steps.b: Any member can submit a verifiable question.
Topics with enough support get commissioned.
AI gathers primary sources; editors verify manually.
Sourced claims instead of prose — one source per claim, uncertainty made visible.

trustStatement.heading: Why you shouldn't just trust us
trustStatement.body: We make selection decisions too: which sources to include, how to frame questions, which perspectives to surface. No platform is free from this. That's why we make every step visible — so you can follow along, question it, and disagree.

items.label: Check the sources
items.text: Every source analysis includes direct links to the original documents. Read them yourself.

items.label: Uncertainty is visible
items.text: Conflicting data or missing evidence is explicitly flagged — not hidden.

items.label: How this report was made
items.text: Every report includes a methodology section: sources used, sources excluded, data date, AI or human verification.

items.label: Objectivity filter
items.text: Emotional language in questions is reduced to make them verifiable — not a claim of neutrality.
